memory.summary: With the project due Thursday and barely started, I'm tempted by leisure now, but that quick chore feels like a necessary small win to maintain momentum.

desires: Secure a small, tangible win on the trivial chore before tonight to prevent my momentum from collapsing and ensure I don't look unreliable when the big project deadline hits in three days.
Maintain enough mental clarity to avoid making careless errors on the term project that would force me into a frantic, high-stress catch-up later.
Minimize any social friction with cohort_3 by not bringing up my looming workload or asking for favors that might disrupt our easy dynamic.

goals.description: Execute the 'quick_chore' immediately to secure a tangible win and prevent momentum collapse before the term project deadline.
goals.rationale: My achievement axis demands visible progress, but my avoidant conflict style means I cannot risk friction with cohort_3 by discussing my stress. Completing this low-effort task is the only way to stabilize my mental state for the harder project without triggering social anxiety or procrastination.

agent.last_reasoning: Completing the trivial chore secures an immediate win, stabilizing my momentum before the term project deadline. I skip leisure to avoid friction and maintain focus, though I feel a slight tension ignoring cohort_3 during this free block.
